button.name: action_bitconn_code_history
button.help: View Bitconn Code history and restore a previous version

button.name: action_bitconn_python_payload_history
button.help: View Python Payload history and restore a previous version

group.name: bitconn_code_section
group.div:
Código Python sem restrições (exec() puro, sem safe_eval). Você pode importar qualquer biblioteca disponível no ambiente Odoo.
Variáveis disponíveis: record (singleton), records (recordset), env, model, self (esta Server Action), time, datetime, dateutil, _logger.
💡 Defina result com o valor de retorno desejado.

field.name: bitconn_code
field.placeholder: # ========================================== # Bitconn Code - Python sem restricoes # ========================================== # Variaveis disponiveis: # record - Registro atual (singleton) # records - Todos os registros selecionados # env - Ambiente Odoo # model - Classe do modelo atual # self - Esta Server Action # UserError, time, datetime, dateutil # uid, user, timezone, float_compare # b64encode, b64decode, log, _logger # # Voce pode importar qualquer biblioteca: # import requests # from datetime import datetime # # Defina result com o valor de retorno: # result = {'ok': True, 'id': record.id} # # Para retornar uma action (ir.actions.act_window): # action = {'type': 'ir.actions.act_window', ...}

group.name: bitconn_webhook_section
group.div:
Write your Python code below. Set result variable to define the payload sent to the webhook.
💡 Tip: Define result as a dict or list. It will be serialized as JSON and sent to the webhook URL.

field.name: bitconn_python_payload_code
field.placeholder: # ========================================== # record - Current record (singleton) # ========================================== # record.id - Record ID # record.name - Record name (display_name) # record._name - Model technical name (e.g. 'res.partner') # record.field_name - Access any field value directly # # records - All records in the current execution (recordset) # env - Odoo Environment. Access any model via env['model.name'] # # Set result variable to define the webhook payload # # ========================================== # Example: Send record data to webhook # ========================================== # result = { # 'id': record.id, # 'name': record.name, # 'email': record.email, # 'model': record._name, # }

group.div: When Manual Payload is enabled, the payload below is sent as-is.
